title: El Cid
writer: Fredric M. Frank, Philip Yordan, Ben Barzman
actors: Charlton Heston, Sophia Loren, Raf Vallone
plot: The fabled Spanish hero Rodrigo Diaz de Vivar (a.k.a. El Cid) overcomes a family vendetta and court intrigue to defend Christian Spain against the Moors.
awards: Nominated for 3 Oscars. 7 wins & 13 nominations total
